Experiment Title: Home Feed Refresh Impact on User Engagement and Retention
---------------------------------------------------------------
Objective: To understand the impact of refresh frequency in a home feed algorithm on user engagement, dwell time control (time spent per session), sessions per user, and retention rates. 

Methodology: A/B testing was conducted with two different treatment groups exposed to varying frequencies of content updates within their personalized feeds over a period of one month. The first group experienced refreshes every hour while the second had them twice daily.
